# Pre-translate with TM + termbase before any vendor sees content

> Generated from [`walkthroughs/kapi-terminology-pretranslation.md`](https://github.com/neokapi/neokapi/blob/main/web/docs/walkthroughs/kapi-terminology-pretranslation.md). Do not edit by hand — change the prompt and regenerate.

Pre-translation is the cheap, deterministic phase that runs before any machine or human translator sees the content. Leverage existing TM, run pseudo-translation on the rest, and pre-flag any terminology violations — all in seconds, no API key required.

## Scene 1 — termbase-pretranslation

<ThemedVideo
  sources={{
    light: "/video/kapi/01-termbase-pretranslation.webm",
    dark: "/video/kapi/01-termbase-pretranslation.webm",
  }}
/>

Set up language assets (termbase + TM), then run the three-step pipeline: TM leverage → pseudo-translate the misses → QA check against the termbase. The output of each step is the input to the next.

## Next

The same three steps fit into a `kapi run` flow so this becomes one command in CI.
